# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI AssistantGuided DSA Practice: Hands-on with Azure OpenAI
- Summary: Show how CodeGrind’s AI assistant helps users solve DSA problems in real time, pairing AI guidance with live code execution.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-learning
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assisted-learning
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-15-codegrind-ai-assisted-learning.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now emphasizes AI-assisted problem solving: users can request hints, model-assisted explanations, and code verification through the Azure OpenAI integration, all within the interactive editor environment. This reinforces learning while maintaining a hands-on, gamified practice flow.
- CTA: Try AI-assisted practice now and compare your solution with AI-guided hints.
- Visual brief: Short-form demo video: a user opens CodeGrind, selects a DSA problem, asks for a hint, and watches the AI assistant provide step-by-step guidance alongside live code execution and test results. Include UI highlights of the editor, AI chat, and Judge0 integration.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
